cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-budget.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o" > "$tmpdir/compile-object.out" 2> "$tmpdir/compile-object.err" && lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation {infile} -o "$tmpdir/a.out" > "$tmpdir/compile-exe.out" 2> "$tmpdir/compile-exe.err" && python3 tests/c_split_budget.py "$tmpdir" --max-helpers 4 --max-generated-c-bytes 4000 --max-object-bytes 6000 --max-executable-bytes 1000000 --max-text-bytes 10000 #
